E-Grant System.

Online Application Process

 The Norcliffe Foundation utilizes an online grants management and application system. All requests must be submitted via this system.

Applicants log into this E-Grant System to create an account with The Norcliffe Foundation to draft, submit, and manage requests for funding. All attachments and follow-up associated with a grant are also submitted through the system. 

Before entering the E-Grant system, please take our Eligibility Quiz to ensure your organization is eligible to submit an application.
Enter E-Grant System

Application Assistance

After reviewing the grant guidelines, FAQs, and the eligibility quiz, feel free to contact the Foundation if you need assistance or are still unsure whether your organization might be eligible for funding.
 © The Norcliffe Foundation
600 University Street, Suite 2003, Seattle, WA 98101
(206) 682-4820
